top_signals.title: US voters say Trump’s Iran war not worth the cost — FT poll
top_signals.summary: Survey shows conflict is dragging down president’s approval ratings ahead of November midterms
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
top_signals.summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Suspected Asian fraud ring exec served fresh warrant in Japan
top_signals.summary: The man, Hu Shi, and two others were initially arrested last month by Tokyo's Metropolitan Police Department on suspicion of submitting a false move-in notification.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Istanbul, 02 Jul 2026 The High-Level Economic Dialogue (HLED) between the European Union and Türkiye was held in İstanbul on 2 July 2026. The meeting was co-chaired by Valdis Dombrov...
